---
title: "Mauro Maver"
image: foto.png
# mainfont: "Lucida Console, monospace"
about:
  template: trestles
  #image-width: 10em 
  #id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.it/citations?user=ZUUEM0sAAAAJ&hl
#    - icon: twitter
#      text: Twitter
#      href: https://twitter.com/Stramon1um
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mauro-maver
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Stramon1um
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/stramon1um.bsky.social
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:mauro.maver@univr.com"
#    - icon: file-person
#      text: CV
#      url: "cv.pdf"
    - icon: person-fill 
      text: ORCiD
      url: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8162-3618
---

<!-- :::{.column-page} -->

*Ciao!* 👋

::: {.style style="text-align:left;line-height:155%"}
My name is Mauro, and I am an Assistant Professor at the University of Verona, Italy. 🇮🇹

My [**research**](papers.qmd) lies within the field of agricultural chemistry, focusing on the chemical and biochemical processes that regulate nutrient cycling and availability in plant–soil systems. 👨‍🔬

I investigate the interactions between soil chemistry, rhizosphere dynamics, and plant nutrition to better understand the mechanisms underlying plant growth and nutrient use efficiency.

More broadly, my expertise encompasses 🌱 plant nutrition and physiology, with a specific focus on plant responses to nutrient availability and deficiency.

I’m a big fan of R and its possibilities, 🧑‍💻 from data analysis and visualisation to publication and bioinformatics. 📉

I also deeply love traditional Irish music and the Gaelic Irish (alias *Gaeilge*) language 🇮🇪, and I enjoy tinkering with electronic components and computers in my free time. 🖥️

Additionally, I am one of the authors of the book 📗[**L'irlandese contemporaneo**](https://www.amazon.it/dp/8892958682/?coliid=I34IVBMHTQRJEP&colid=36FABK7A5OZ2Q&psc=0&ref_=list_c_wl_lv_ov_lig_dp_it), which provides a compendium of historical, grammatical, and socio-linguistic identity notions of the Gaelic Irish language. It is available in both digital and print formats.

<!-- ✍️ Founder and Editor-in-Chief of [**Omnia**](omnia.qmd), an independent and multidisciplinary open-access journal. -->

Here's my random blog for random stuff > [**Rebelòt**](rebelot.qmd)


:::

<!-- Mastodon verification -->
<a rel="me" style="display:none" href="https://sciences.social/@stramon1um">Hidden link used to verify my account on sciences.social</a>
